Problem Statement: In the following exercises, write each system of linear equations as an augmented matrix.
Question: ⓐ $$\{ \left .\begin{matrix}{a}3 x - y = -1 \\ 2 y = 2 x + 5\end{matrix}\right .$$ ⓑ $$\{ \left .\begin{matrix}{a}4 x + 3 y = -2 \\ x - 2 y - 3 z = 7 \\ 2 x - y + 2 z = -6\end{matrix}\right .$$

Problem Statement: In the following exercises, write each system of linear equations as an augmented matrix.
Question: ⓐ $$\{ \left .\begin{matrix}{a}2 x + 4 y = -5 \\ 3 x - 2 y = 2\end{matrix}\right .$$ ⓑ $$\{ \left .\begin{matrix}{a}3 x - 2 y - z = -2 \\ -2 x + y = 5 \\ 5 x + 4 y + z = -1\end{matrix}\right .$$

Problem Statement: In the following exercises, write each system of linear equations as an augmented matrix.
Question: ⓐ $$\{ \left .\begin{matrix}{a}3 x - y = -4 \\ 2 x = y + 2\end{matrix}\right .$$ ⓑ $$\{ \left .\begin{matrix}{a}x - 3 y - 4 z = -2 \\ 4 x + 2 y + 2 z = 5 \\ 2 x - 5 y + 7 z = -8\end{matrix}\right .$$

Problem Statement: In the following exercises, write each system of linear equations as an augmented matrix.
Question: ⓐ $$\{ \left .\begin{matrix}{a}2 x - 5 y = -3 \\ 4 x = 3 y - 1\end{matrix}\right .$$ ⓑ $$\{ \left .\begin{matrix}{a}4 x + 3 y - 2 z = -3 \\ -2 x + y - 3 z = 4 \\ \text{unicode[:-]} x - 4 y + 5 z = -2\end{matrix}\right .$$

Problem Statement: Write the system of equations that corresponds to the augmented matrix.
Question: $$[ \left .\begin{matrix}{aaaa}2 &  &  & -1 \\ 1 &  &  & -3\end{matrix}\right . | \left .\begin{matrix}{a}4 \\ 2\end{matrix}\right . ]$$

Problem Statement: Write the system of equations that corresponds to the augmented matrix.
Question: $$[ \left .\begin{matrix}{aaaa}2 &  &  & -4 \\ 3 &  &  & -3\end{matrix}\right . | \left .\begin{matrix}{a}-2 \\ -1\end{matrix}\right . ]$$

Problem Statement: Write the system of equations that corresponds to the augmented matrix.
Question: $$[ \left .\begin{matrix}{aaaaaaa}1 &  &  & 0 &  &  & -3 \\ 1 &  &  & -2 &  &  & 0 \\ 0 &  &  & -1 &  &  & 2\end{matrix}\right . | \left .\begin{matrix}{a}-1 \\ -2 \\ 3\end{matrix}\right . ]$$

Problem Statement: Write the system of equations that corresponds to the augmented matrix.
Question: $$[ \left .\begin{matrix}{aaaaaaa}2 &  &  & -2 &  &  & 0 \\ 0 &  &  & 2 &  &  & -1 \\ 3 &  &  & 0 &  &  & -1\end{matrix}\right . | \left .\begin{matrix}{a}-1 \\ 2 \\ -2\end{matrix}\right . ]$$
Answer: $$\{ \left .\begin{matrix}{a}2 x - 2 y = -1 \\ 2 y - z = 2 \\ 3 x - z = -2\end{matrix}\right .$$

Problem Statement: In the following exercises, perform the indicated operations on the augmented matrices.
Question: $$[ \left .\begin{matrix}{aaaa}6 &  &  & -4 \\ 3 &  &  & -2\end{matrix}\right . | \left .\begin{matrix}{a}3 \\ 1\end{matrix}\right . ]$$ ⓐ Interchange rows 1 and 2 ⓑ Multiply row 2 by 3 ⓒ Multiply row 2 by $$-2$$ and add row 1 to it.

Problem Statement: In the following exercises, perform the indicated operations on the augmented matrices.
Question: $$[ \left .\begin{matrix}{aaaa}4 &  &  & -6 \\ 3 &  &  & 2\end{matrix}\right . | \left .\begin{matrix}{a}-3 \\ 1\end{matrix}\right . ]$$ ⓐ Interchange rows 1 and 2 ⓑ Multiply row 1 by 4 ⓒ Multiply row 2 by 3 and add row 1 to it.

Problem Statement: In the following exercises, perform the indicated operations on the augmented matrices.
Question: $$[ \left .\begin{matrix}{aaaaaaa}4 &  &  & -12 &  &  & -8 \\ 4 &  &  & -2 &  &  & -3 \\ -6 &  &  & 2 &  &  & -1\end{matrix}\right . | \left .\begin{matrix}{a}16 \\ -1 \\ -1\end{matrix}\right . ]$$ ⓐ Interchange rows 2 and 3 ⓑ Multiply row 1 by 4 ⓒ Multiply row 2 by $$-2$$ and add to row 3.

Problem Statement: In the following exercises, perform the indicated operations on the augmented matrices.
Question: $$[ \left .\begin{matrix}{aaaaaaa}6 &  &  & -5 &  &  & 2 \\ 2 &  &  & 1 &  &  & -4 \\ 3 &  &  & -3 &  &  & 1\end{matrix}\right . | \left .\begin{matrix}{a}3 \\ 5 \\ -1\end{matrix}\right . ]$$ ⓐ Interchange rows 2 and 3 ⓑ Multiply row 2 by 5 ⓒ Multiply row 3 by $$-2$$ and add to row 1.

Problem Statement: In the following exercises, perform the indicated operations on the augmented matrices.
Question: Perform the needed row operation that will get the first entry in row 2 to be zero in the augmented matrix: $$[ \left .\begin{matrix}{aaaa}1 &  &  & 2 \\ -3 &  &  & -4\end{matrix}\right . | \left .\begin{matrix}{a}5 \\ -1\end{matrix}\right . ] .$$

Problem Statement: In the following exercises, perform the indicated operations on the augmented matrices.
Question: Perform the needed row operations that will get the first entry in both row 2 and row 3 to be zero in the augmented matrix: $$[ \left .\begin{matrix}{aaaaaaa}1 &  &  & -2 &  &  & 3 \\ 3 &  &  & -1 &  &  & -2 \\ 2 &  &  & -3 &  &  & -4\end{matrix}\right . | \left .\begin{matrix}{a}-4 \\ 5 \\ -1\end{matrix}\right . ] .$$

Problem Statement: In the following exercises, solve each system of equations using a matrix.
Question: $$\{ \left .\begin{matrix}{a}2 x + y = 2 \\ x - y = -2\end{matrix}\right .$$

Problem Statement: In the following exercises, solve each system of equations using a matrix.
Question: $$\{ \left .\begin{matrix}{a}3 x + y = 2 \\ x - y = 2\end{matrix}\right .$$

Problem Statement: In the following exercises, solve each system of equations using a matrix.
Question: $$\{ \left .\begin{matrix}{a}\text{unicode[:-]} x + 2 y = -2 \\ x + y = -4\end{matrix}\right .$$

Problem Statement: In the following exercises, solve each system of equations using a matrix.
Question: $$\{ \left .\begin{matrix}{a}-2 x + 3 y = 3 \\ x + 3 y = 12\end{matrix}\right .$$

Problem Statement: In the following exercises, solve each system of equations using a matrix.
Question: $$\{ \left .\begin{matrix}{a}2 x - 3 y + z = 19 \\ -3 x + y - 2 z = -15 \\ x + y + z = 0\end{matrix}\right .$$

Problem Statement: In the following exercises, solve each system of equations using a matrix.
Question: $$\{ \left .\begin{matrix}{a}2 x - y + 3 z = -3 \\ \text{unicode[:-]} x + 2 y - z = 10 \\ x + y + z = 5\end{matrix}\right .$$

Problem Statement: In the following exercises, solve each system of equations using a matrix.
Question: $$\{ \left .\begin{matrix}{a}2 x - 6 y + z = 3 \\ 3 x + 2 y - 3 z = 2 \\ 2 x + 3 y - 2 z = 3\end{matrix}\right .$$

Problem Statement: In the following exercises, solve each system of equations using a matrix.
Question: $$\{ \left .\begin{matrix}{a}4 x - 3 y + z = 7 \\ 2 x - 5 y - 4 z = 3 \\ 3 x - 2 y - 2 z = -7\end{matrix}\right .$$

Problem Statement: In the following exercises, solve each system of equations using a matrix.
Question: $$\{ \left .\begin{matrix}{a}x + 2 z = 0 \\ 4 y + 3 z = -2 \\ 2 x - 5 y = 3\end{matrix}\right .$$

Problem Statement: In the following exercises, solve each system of equations using a matrix.
Question: $$\{ \left .\begin{matrix}{a}2 x + 5 y = 4 \\ 3 y - z = 3 \\ 4 x + 3 z = -3\end{matrix}\right .$$

Problem Statement: In the following exercises, solve each system of equations using a matrix.
Question: $$\{ \left .\begin{matrix}{a}2 y + 3 z = -1 \\ 5 x + 3 y = -6 \\ 7 x + z = 1\end{matrix}\right .$$

Problem Statement: In the following exercises, solve each system of equations using a matrix.
Question: $$\{ \left .\begin{matrix}{a}3 x - z = -3 \\ 5 y + 2 z = -6 \\ 4 x + 3 y = -8\end{matrix}\right .$$

Problem Statement: In the following exercises, solve each system of equations using a matrix.
Question: $$\{ \left .\begin{matrix}{a}2 x + 3 y + z = 12 \\ x + y + z = 9 \\ 3 x + 4 y + 2 z = 20\end{matrix}\right .$$

Problem Statement: In the following exercises, solve each system of equations using a matrix.
Question: $$\{ \left .\begin{matrix}{a}x + 2 y + 6 z = 5 \\ \text{unicode[:-]} x + y - 2 z = 3 \\ x - 4 y - 2 z = 1\end{matrix}\right .$$

Problem Statement: In the following exercises, solve each system of equations using a matrix.
Question: $$\{ \left .\begin{matrix}{a}x + 2 y - 3 z = -1 \\ x - 3 y + z = 1 \\ 2 x - y - 2 z = 2\end{matrix}\right .$$

Problem Statement: In the following exercises, solve each system of equations using a matrix.
Question: $$\{ \left .\begin{matrix}{a}4 x - 3 y + 2 z = 0 \\ -2 x + 3 y - 7 z = 1 \\ 2 x - 2 y + 3 z = 6\end{matrix}\right .$$

Problem Statement: In the following exercises, solve each system of equations using a matrix.
Question: $$\{ \left .\begin{matrix}{a}x - y + 2 z = -4 \\ 2 x + y + 3 z = 2 \\ -3 x + 3 y - 6 z = 12\end{matrix}\right .$$

Problem Statement: In the following exercises, solve each system of equations using a matrix.
Question: $$\{ \left .\begin{matrix}{a}\text{unicode[:-]} x - 3 y + 2 z = 14 \\ \text{unicode[:-]} x + 2 y - 3 z = -4 \\ 3 x + y - 2 z = 6\end{matrix}\right .$$
Answer: infinitely many solutions $$( x , y , z )$$ where $$x = \frac{1}{2} z + 4 ; y = \frac{1}{2} z - 6 ; z$$ is any real number

Problem Statement: In the following exercises, solve each system of equations using a matrix.
Question: $$\{ \left .\begin{matrix}{a}x + y - 3 z = -1 \\ y - z = 0 \\ \text{unicode[:-]} x + 2 y = 1\end{matrix}\right .$$

Problem Statement: In the following exercises, solve each system of equations using a matrix.
Question: $$\{ \left .\begin{matrix}{a}x + 2 y + z = 4 \\ x + y - 2 z = 3 \\ -2 x - 3 y + z = -7\end{matrix}\right .$$
Answer: infinitely many solutions $$( x , y , z )$$ where $$x = 5 z + 2 ; y = -3 z + 1 ; z$$ is any real number

Question: Solve the system of equations $$\{ \left .\begin{matrix}{a}x + y = 10 \\ x - y = 6\end{matrix}\right .$$ ⓐ by graphing and ⓑ by substitution. ⓒ Which method do you prefer? Why?
Solve the system of equations $$\{ \left .\begin{matrix}{a}3 x + y = 12 \\ x = y - 8\end{matrix}\right .$$ by substitution and explain all your steps in words.
